Permalink to DescriptionClimate models are used for a varie", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "Shown here are the predicted surface temperatures under the RCP 8.5 emissions scenario using GFDL's CM3 model.", "direct_quote": "Shown here are the predicted surface temperatures under the RCP 8.5 emissions scenario using GFDL's CM3 model.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "In the RCP 8.5 emissions scenario the radiative forcing level reaches 8.5 W/m2 characterized by increasing greenhouse gas emissions over tim...", "direct_quote": "In the RCP 8.5 emissions scenario the radiative forcing level reaches 8.5 W/m2 characterized by increasing greenhouse gas emissions over time representative for scenarios in the literature leading to high greenhouse gas concentration levels.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}], "evidence_summary": "Auto-extracted 3 facts."}]}
